concerns.text: FR-002 mandates quantization at bit depths 1, 8, 10, 12, 14, and 16. Tasks T014 and T021 explicitly restrict the pilot implementation to only depths 1, 8, 12, and 16. There are no tasks to implement or test the 10-bit and 14-bit quantization logic, leaving these functional requirements unaddressed in the implementation plan.

SC-005 requires measuring reproducibility via 10 independent runs of '[deferred]' signals (implying the full statistically representative sample size defined in the research strategy). Task T031 limits this to 10 runs of the N=800 pilot batch. If the pilot size is insufficient to satisfy the statistical power required by SC-005, the success criterion cannot be met by the current tasks.

US-1 Acceptance Scenario 1 requires verifying that '[deferred] of the resulting strain data' has SNR within [8, 50] with ±0.5 tolerance. Task T013a attempts to verify this but the plan's stratified sampling (research.md) bins signals into discrete ranges (8-14, 14-20, etc.) rather than generating a continuous distribution. The task description does not explicitly account for verifying the distribution across the full continuous range as implied by the acceptance scenario, creating a potential gap in coverage for the 'full range' requirement.
